query: Yes, all the details are correct. I have two certificates I’d like to use to pay. If only one can be used, please use the larger one and pay the rest with my 7447 card. I have 3 baggages in total—can you confirm the baggage fees as well?

candidate_answers.text: I’ll check your saved payment methods and membership details so I can confirm which certificate to use and whether your 3 checked bags will incur any fees.
The itinerary is already selected, but payment and baggage handling depend on the user profile. The grounded next move is to retrieve the user’s saved payment methods and membership information.

provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user’s request using only visible conversation evidence.
